text: Chop induces apoptosis through the control of target genes (B’chir et al., 2014);(Teske et al., 2013)  Chop deficiency can reduce the extent of cell death after ER stress (Tamaki et al., 2008)(Hiramatsu et al., 2014)  Forced expression of CHOP increases the induction of cell death (Han et al., 2013) also in hepatocytes. (Uzi et al., 2013)(Rao et al., 2015)(Pfaffenbach et al., no date)  mRNA expression of CHOP can be measured (Kandel-Kfir et al., 2015)  Reviews  (Dara, Ji and Kaplowitz, 2011); (Oyadomari and Mori, 2004); (Urra et al., 2013); (Hetz, 2012); (Sano and Reed, 2013); (Gorman et al., 2012); (Li et al., 2014);
